offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent sales cause missed tax deadlines. We automate payroll tax compliance instead of manual calculations and filing with no reminders.
problem: Difficulty in managing payroll tax compliance due to varying sales volumes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
